name: Dunk Perfect
author: Poki
description: Dunk Perfect is a 3D sports game created by Ranida Games. In this freestyle slam dunk basketball game, your character aims to jump as high as possible to score three-points and also some points for style! Showcase great slam moves, experience challenging levels, and unlock amazing power-ups to customize your character. Can you earn a perfect score in all of the levels? How to play: Jump - Drag left mouse button and release Rotate - Hold down left or right arrow keys About the creator: Dunk Perfect is created by Ranida Games. This is their first game on Poki !
